summary: The video shows a nighttime scene on a multi-laned highway with vehicles traveling at moderate speeds. Bright streetlights illuminate the road, and several cars are visible ahead. Toward the end of the sequence, emergency vehicles appear alongside the roadway.

events_timeline.event: Emergency vehicles arrive on the highway.

uncertainties: Weather conditions are unclear due to limited visibility.

risk_assessment.why: Emergency vehicles arriving on the highway do not indicate an active incident.
